_note: Curated map of GAM package_id to aquifer(s). aquifer_kind values of 'major'/'minor' are best-effort derivations from TWDB boundary_match source_id and model titles; they MUST be verified against the official TWDB major/minor aquifer designations (https://www.twdb.texas.gov/groundwater/aquifer/index.asp) before relying on them for production lookups. Where aquifer_kind is listed as 'verify', the classification is uncertain and requires manual review.

edwards-trinity-plateau-and-pecos-valley._note: Spans Edwards-Trinity Plateau (major) and Pecos Valley (major). Both names should be tried against the major-aquifers layer. Verify both are present in AQU_NAME field.

edwards-bfz-aquifer-barton-springs-segme._note: Edwards BFZ (Balcones Fault Zone) is classified as a major aquifer. The AQU_NAME field value may differ from the title; verify against FeatureServer.

gma-16-groundwater-flow-model._note: GMA 16 is a Groundwater Management Area model, not named after a single aquifer. The original manifest used 'model_area_approx' source. No reliable AQU_NAME lookup available; this model will fall through to failed_no_spatial unless a manual bbox is provided via gam_manifest_overrides.json.

hueco-bolsons-aquifer-gam._note: Hueco Bolson is often combined with Mesilla Bolson as 'Hueco-Mesilla Bolson' in TWDB minor aquifer layer. Verify AQU_NAME value.

igneous-and-west-texas-bolsons-wild-hors._note: Multi-aquifer GAM spanning several West Texas minor bolson aquifers. AQU_NAME values need verification — some may be combined or named differently in the TWDB layer.

kinney-county-model._note: Kinney County model covers the Brackettville area / Kinney County. The relevant aquifer may be Edwards-Trinity (Plateau) but this model's scope is sub-county. Original manifest used 'model_area_approx'. Consider adding manual bbox via gam_manifest_overrides.json.

llano-uplift-aquifer-system-gam._note: Llano Uplift aquifer system. Verify AQU_NAME value in the minor-aquifers layer.

lower-rio-grande-valley-transport-model._note: Lower Rio Grande Valley transport model — covers a regional alluvial area rather than a named TWDB aquifer. Original manifest used 'model_area_approx'. Consider adding manual bbox via gam_manifest_overrides.json.

mesilla-bolsons-aquifer-gam._note: Mesilla Bolson is often combined with Hueco as 'Hueco-Mesilla Bolson' in the TWDB minor-aquifers layer. Verify AQU_NAME value.

seymour-and-blaine-aquifers-gam._note: Spans both Seymour and Blaine minor aquifers; fallback bbox will union both extents.

west-texas-bolsons-red-light-green-river._note: Multi-aquifer GAM spanning West Texas minor bolson aquifers. AQU_NAME values need verification — TWDB may use different naming conventions.
